children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established within the Department an Office of Cargo Security Policy (referred to in this section as the “Office”).
coordinate all Department policies relating to cargo security; and
consult with stakeholders and coordinate with other Federal agencies in the establishment of standards and regulations and to promote best practices.

children.label: A
children.text: be appointed by the Secretary; and

children.label: B
children.text: report to the Assistant Secretary for Policy.

children.label: A
children.text: advise the Assistant Secretary for Policy in the development of Department-wide policies regarding cargo security;

children.label: B
children.text: coordinate all policies relating to cargo security among the agencies and offices within the Department relating to cargo security; and

children.label: C
children.text: coordinate the cargo security policies of the Department with the policies of other executive agencies.
